Tech Seventh Semester Regular Examination (AR-22) MCA Third Semester Regular Examination (AR-24) BCA Fifth Semester Regular Examination (AR-23) BCA Third Semester Regular Examination (AR-24) BBA Fifth Semester Regular Examination (AR-23) BBA Third Semester Regular Examination (AR-24) B.Tech Third Semester Regular Examination (AR-24) B.Tech Fifth Semester Regular Examination (AR-23) 2o e e = The students those who are interested for rechecking of their answer scripts may apply in the prescribed format along with required fee of Rs.400/- (Rupees Four Hundred only) per subject to their concerned Head of the department on or before 08.01.2026. Application received beyond the due date will not be considered. N.B: Students shall download the application form from the University website.
